title: Google’s always-on AI agent is expanding, but it won’t come cheap
excerpt: Available to AI Ultra subscribers globally
content_html:
Published Jul 24, 2026, 2:15 AM EDT

I've been writing about Android since 2011, with a focus on device reviews, Samsung and Google Pixel hardware, and the latest happenings in the ecosystem. In my entire writing career, I've reviewed more than 75 Android phones.

Carrying both a Samsung or Pixel flagship and an iPhone as a daily driver provides me with deep insight into how Android works and how it compares to iOS.

I have been writing for Android Police since 2021, covering news, how-tos, and features. You can find my previous work on Neowin, AndroidBeat, Times of India, iPhoneHacks, MySmartPrice, and MakeUseOf.

When not working, I tend to mindlessly scroll through X, play with new AI models, or go on long road trips. You can reach out to me on X or drop a mail at rajesh@androidpolice.com.

Sign in to your Android Police account

Earlier in July, Google upgraded Gemini Spark, its always-on AI agent, with computer-use capabilities and integration with the Gemini app for Mac, enabling it to complete tasks on your behalf. After initially being available in limited preview, Google expanded Spark access to its AI Ultra subscribers in the US. Now, the company is further broadening Spark's availability to more markets and subscribers.

In the US, Google AI Pro subscribers can now access Gemini Spark. Globally, the AI agent is rolling out to AI Ultra subscribers, with local language support, though the EEA, UK, Switzerland, and Nigeria are not part of the expansion. Google's AI Ultra plan starts from $100 per month and provides higher rate limits for Gemini models, additional storage, and other perks.

Given Spark's international expansion, it should only be a matter of weeks before it becomes available to AI Pro subscribers outside the US.

Besides your computer, you can access Gemini Spark on Android, iOS, and the web. If you have an eligible subscription, you should see Spark appear in the sidebar, located between Search chats and Daily Brief.

Spark is a great way to explore what an always-on AI agent can do

With Google adding MCP support to Gemini Spark earlier this month, you can do a lot more with the AI agent than before. Connect Spark to your Workspace account, and it can carry out multi-step actions on your behalf, like finding the best travel deals and booking for your upcoming trip.

You can also create reusable skills for future tasks. For example, Spark can analyze your emails, turn your writing style into a skill, and apply it whenever you ask the agent to draft an email.

If you don’t want the hassle of setting up OpenClaw or Hermes on your PC, Spark offers a more accessible alternative. It provides an easy way to explore what an always-on AI agent can do, from handling multi-step workflows to automating repetitive tasks across apps.

Its reusable skills should make it more useful over time, allowing the agent to adapt to how you work and save you considerable time. The main barrier is its limited availability and subscription requirement. But if you pay for an eligible Google AI plan, Spark could be a practical entry point into the world of autonomous AI agents.

content_html_zh:
发布于 2026 年 7 月 24 日，美国东部时间凌晨 2:15

自 2011 年以来，我一直在撰写有关 Android 的文章，重点关注设备评论、三星和 Google Pixel 硬件以及生态系统中的最新动态。 在我的整个写作生涯中，我评测过超过 75 款 Android 手机。

日常驾驶时同时携带三星或 Pixel 旗舰产品和 iPhone，让我能够深入了解 Android 的工作原理以及它与 iOS 的比较。

自 2021 年以来，我一直为 Android Police 撰写文章，内容涵盖新闻、操作方法和功能。 您可以在 Neowin、AndroidBeat、Times of India、iPhoneHacks、MySmartPrice 和 MakeUseOf 上找到我之前的作品。

不工作时，我倾向于无意识地浏览 X、玩新的人工智能模型，或者进行长途旅行。 您可以通过 X 联系我或发送邮件至 rajesh@androidpolice.com。

登录您的 Android Police 帐户

7 月初，Google 升级了始终在线的 AI 代理 Gemini Spark，使其具有计算机使用功能并与 Mac 版 Gemini 应用程序集成，使其能够代表您完成任务。 最初仅提供有限预览版后，Google 将 Spark 的访问范围扩大到了美国的 AI Ultra 订阅者。 现在，该公司正在进一步将 Spark 的可用性扩展到更多市场和订户。

在美国，Google AI Pro 订阅者现在可以访问 Gemini Spark。 在全球范围内，AI 代理正在向 AI Ultra 订阅者推出，并提供本地语言支持，但欧洲经济区、英国、瑞士和尼日利亚并未参与扩展。 Google 的 AI Ultra 计划起价为每月 100 美元，为 Gemini 型号提供更高的费率限制、额外的存储空间和其他福利。

鉴于 Spark 的国际扩张，美国以外的 AI Pro 订阅者只需几周时间即可使用它。

除了计算机之外，您还可以在 Android、iOS 和 Web 上访问 Gemini Spark。 如果您有符合条件的订阅，您应该会看到 Spark 出现在侧边栏中，位于搜索聊天和每日简报之间。

Spark 是探索永远在线的 AI 代理功能的好方法

随着 Google 本月早些时候向 Gemini Spark 添加 MCP 支持，您可以使用 AI 代理做比以前更多的事情。 将 Spark 连接到您的 Workspace 帐户，它可以代表您执行多步骤操作，例如查找最佳旅行优惠和预订即将到来的旅行。

您还可以为未来的任务创建可重用的技能。 例如，Spark 可以分析您的电子邮件，将您的写作风格转化为一种技能，并在您要求客服人员起草电子邮件时应用它。

如果您不想在 PC 上设置 OpenClaw 或 Hermes 的麻烦，Spark 提供了更易于访问的替代方案。 它提供了一种简单的方法来探索始终在线的人工智能代理可以做什么，从处理多步骤工作流程到跨应用程序自动执行重复任务。

其可重复使用的技能应该会随着时间的推移变得更加有用，使代理能够适应您的工作方式并为您节省大量时间。 主要障碍是其有限的可用性和订阅要求。 但如果你购买符合条件的 Google AI 计划，Spark 可能会成为进入自主 AI 代理世界的实用切入点。
